user.title: Connect Svitgrid
user.description: How would you like to connect to Svitgrid?

menu_options.pair: Pair with the Svitgrid mobile app (recommended)

manual_meta.title: Inverter details
manual_meta.description: Tell Svitgrid about your inverter. The brand and model are shown on the dashboard; phases / battery / PV-strings drive which sensors the next step asks for.

manual_entities.title: Map Home Assistant entities
manual_entities.description: For each field Svitgrid tracks, pick the matching Home Assistant sensor entity. At least one must be set. Skip any field you don't have (e.g. battery sensors on a grid-tie inverter, PV2 if you only have one string).

abort.pairing_expired: The pairing code expired. Try again.
abort.pairing_failed: Pairing failed. Check Home Assistant logs.
abort.cannot_connect: Could not reach the Svitgrid cloud. Check your internet.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot reach the Svitgrid cloud. Check your internet.
error.no_entities_selected: Pick at least one sensor — otherwise the dashboard has nothing to show.

init.title: Manage inverters
init.description: Add a new inverter, edit sensor mappings for an existing inverter, or remove one.

add_inverter.title: Add inverter — details
add_inverter.description: Enter the brand, model, and hardware details for the new inverter.

add_inverter_entities.title: Add inverter — map sensors
add_inverter_entities.description: For each field Svitgrid tracks, pick the matching Home Assistant sensor entity. At least one must be set.

edit_inverter.title: Edit sensor mappings
edit_inverter.description: Select the inverter to edit, then re-map its Home Assistant sensors. Clear a field to stop sending it. At least one must be set.

remove_inverter.title: Remove inverter
remove_inverter.description: Select the inverter to remove. This only removes it from Home Assistant — the inverter remains in your Svitgrid account.

error.no_entities_selected: Pick at least one sensor — otherwise the dashboard has nothing to show.

abort.cannot_connect: Could not reach the Svitgrid cloud while adding the inverter. Check your internet and try again.
abort.inverter_not_found: The selected inverter no longer exists in the config entry.
abort.cannot_remove_last_inverter: You cannot remove the last inverter. Delete the integration instead.
